name: Encryption at Rest (EAR)
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends openssl && mkdir -p init-ear/keys && echo "✅ EAR exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ear-demo   (guided EAR demo)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql        (YSQL shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ear-ws       (Workshop shell for manual exercises)"'
